series_metadata.series_title: Credit Union Attorney Work Papers, Legal Memorandum, and Legal Research.
series_metadata.series_description: These files include legal memorandum, legal research, and attorney work papers for legal projects related to credit unions, completed by attorneys employed by the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files until they are no longer of Administrative value., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
